analysis: You started this stretch on 14 July with a rough 5h 57m, but then you absolutely stacked a 9h 22m recovery night followed by four nights sitting comfortably in the 7-to-8-hour range, which is genuinely good work. Your REM has been mostly solid — that 2h 12m on the second night is a standout, and you've held over 1h 43m most nights, which means your brain is doing its thing. The gap worth noticing is deep sleep, which has been patchy all week — 28 minutes, 36, 34, and a nice 53-minute spike mid-stretch before dipping back down to the high 20s; the ritual stack you're running should be helping that, so it's worth watching whether the cold blast or the yin yoga timing needs tweaking. The other thing sneaking up is awake time — last night's 1h 22m is the highest of the week, so something's disturbing the back half of your sleep and you, gorgeous, deserve uninterrupted hours.
